x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: Now Assist change summarization reads description, risk, impact, and assignment_group. Well-populated change records enable AI-generated risk assessments with real specificity.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Enforce short_description as mandatory at change creation via UI policy. Target: ≤5% of changes missing descriptions in the trailing 12 months. Now Assist change summarization reads this field to generate AI risk assessments.

sys_update_version.name: x_snc_airop_check_definition_3af8d9c7cfd587108935fb251d851c6a
sys_update_version.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update table="x_snc_airop_check_definition"><x_snc_airop_check_definition action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><ai_justification><![CDATA[Now Assist change summarization reads description, risk, impact, and assignment_group. Well-populated change records enable AI-generated risk assessments with real specificity.]]></ai_justification><check_name>Change Record Data Completeness</check_name><check_script><![CDATA[(function(checkDef, dateFilter) {
    var cutoff = new GlideDateTime();
    cutoff.addYearsUTC(-1);

    var gaTotal = new GlideAggregate('change_request');
    gaTotal.addQuery('sys_created_on', '>=', cutoff.getValue());
    gaTotal.addAggregate('COUNT');
    gaTotal.query();
    var total = gaTotal.next() ? parseInt(gaTotal.getAggregate('COUNT')) : 0;

    if (total === 0) {
        return {
            status: 'not_applicable',
            actualValue: 'No change requests in last 12 months',
            finding: 'No change requests found in the last 12 months. Change data completeness cannot be assessed.'
        };
    }

    var gaMissingDesc = new GlideAggregate('change_request');
    gaMissingDesc.addQuery('sys_created_on', '>=', cutoff.getValue());
    gaMissingDesc.addQuery('short_description', '');
    gaMissingDesc.addAggregate('COUNT');
    gaMissingDesc.query();
    var missingDesc = gaMissingDesc.next() ? parseInt(gaMissingDesc.getAggregate('COUNT')) : 0;

    var descPct = Math.round((missingDesc / total) * 100);
    var actualValue = 'Missing description: ' + descPct + '% (' + missingDesc + ' of ' + total + ' changes in last 12 months)';

    if (descPct <= 5) {
        return {
            status: 'ready',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: 'Only ' + descPct + '% of recent change requests are missing descriptions. Now Assist change summarization has strong text content for AI risk assessment.'
        };
    } else if (descPct <= 20) {
        return {
            status: 'needs_attention',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: descPct + '% of recent change requests are missing descriptions (target: ≤5%). Now Assist change risk assessment will have gaps for undescribed changes.'
        };
    } else {
        return {
            status: 'not_ready',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: descPct + '% of recent change requests are missing descriptions. Now Assist change summarization reads short_description for AI risk assessment — critical data gap.'
        };
    }
})]]></check_script><is_active>true</is_active><is_clone_sensitive>false</is_clone_sensitive><is_manual>false</is_manual><module>ITSM</module><number>CHK0000342</number><order>280</order><remediation_guidance>Enforce short_description as mandatory at change creation via UI policy. Target: ≤5% of changes missing descriptions in the trailing 12 months. Now Assist change summarization reads this field to generate AI risk assessments.</remediation_guidance><sys_class_name>x_snc_airop_check_definition</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2026-06-10 06:41:19</sys_created_on><sys_id>3af8d9c7cfd587108935fb251d851c6a</sys_id><sys_mod_count>1</sys_mod_count><sys_name>Change Record Data Completeness</sys_name><sys_package display_value="ServiceNow AI Readiness Optimization Platform" source="x_snc_airop">73e2562fcf244b908935fb251d851c78</sys_package><sys_policy/><sys_scope display_value="ServiceNow AI Readiness Optimization Platform">73e2562fcf244b908935fb251d851c78</sys_scope><sys_update_name>x_snc_airop_check_definition_3af8d9c7cfd587108935fb251d851c6a</sys_update_name><sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2026-06-10 06:54:01</sys_updated_on></x_snc_airop_check_definition></record_update>
